name: Wraith King
description: Purer than flesh, stronger than bone, imperishable is the essence of the wraith.

abilities.name: Vampiric Spirit
abilities.description: Grants Wraith King and his Skeleton Warriors' attacks lifesteal. Wraithfire Blast of the corresponding level fully replaces the slow component upon a Reincarnation proc, with a slower projectile speed when off-cooldown. Aura Radius: 0 (1200). Move Speed Bonus: 10%/15%/20%/25%. Attack Speed Bonus: 30/45/60/75. Wraith Form Duration: 3.5/4/4.5/5 (4.5/5/5.5/6). Self Respawn Time Reduction: 3.5/4/4.5/5 (4.5/5/5.5/6). Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: Wraithfire Blast
abilities.description: Sears an enemy unit with a spectral fire projectile that stuns and damages on hit, then slows and damages over time. Wraithfire Blast of the corresponding level fully replaces the Reincarnation ability slow component upon proc, with a slower projectile speed. Cast Range: 525. First Damage: 80/100/120/140. Damage per Second: 20/40/60/80. Move Speed Slow: 20%. Slow Duration: 2. Stun Duration: 1/1.2/1.4/1.6 (1.75/1.95/2.15/2.35). Cooldown: 14/12/10/8. Mana Cost: 95/110/125/140.

abilities.name: Bone Guard
abilities.description: The King can summon skeletons to fight for him. Wraith King's blade drains his enemy's essence to feed his aura. Summon Radius: 300. Max Charges: 2/4/6/8. Base Number of Skeletons: 0 (5). Skeleton Duration: 46. Building Damage Factor: 0.39. Hero Damage Factor: 1.25. Cooldown: 70/80/90/100.

abilities.name: Spectral Blade
abilities.description: Grants self outgoing attack damage bonus while Wraith Form is active, and while Mortal Strike is off cooldown. Wraithfire Blast of the corresponding level fully replaces the slow component upon a Reincarnation proc, with a slower projectile speed when off-cooldown. Damage: 10/25/40/55. Lifesteal Factor: 1. Effect Radius: 600. Crit Damage: 160%/200%/240%/280%. Outgoing Attack Damage Amp: (150%). Move Speed Slow: 75% (0). Cooldown: 5.5/5/4.5/4. Mana Cost: 180/150/120.

abilities.name: Mortal Strike
abilities.description: Passively deals critical damage on an attack with a cooldown. Grants self outgoing attack damage bonus while Wraith Form is active, and while Mortal Strike is off cooldown. Crit Damage: 160%/200%/240%/280%. Outgoing Attack Damage Amp: (150%). Cooldown: 5.5/5/4.5/4.

abilities.name: Reincarnation
abilities.description: The Wraith King reforms after death, allowing him to resurrect when killed in battle. Applies a movement speed slow and an attack speed slow upon death to enemy heroes within the radius when off-cooldown. Wraithfire Blast of the corresponding level fully replaces the slow component upon a Reincarnation proc, with a slower projectile speed when off-cooldown. Effect Radius: 600. Move Speed Slow: 75% (0). Attack Speed Slow: 75 (0). Slow Duration: 4 (0). Current Health as Self Damage: 100%. Mana Cost as Mana Restore: 100%. Cooldown: 180/150/120. Mana Cost: 200.
